tracks.meaning: to press or squeeze something with force, typically between two surfaces or hands
to move forward by pushing through a crowd or obstacles with difficulty
to have a strong romantic or emotional attraction to someone
a person for whom one has a strong romantic attraction or infatuation
a beverage made by pressing fruit or other ingredients, typically juice
to process plant material by pressing to extract liquid or oil
a zone of intense deformation in rock formed by tectonic stress
to suppress or inhibit the growth or expression of something
a disciplinary action or consequence resulting from punishment
